reference: I CAN NO SOONER GIVE YOU SOME LITTLE HINTS WHEREABOUTS THEY LIVE BUT YOU KNOW THEM PRESENTLY AND I MEANT YOU SHOULD BE BEHOLDING TO ME FOR YOUR ACQUAINTANCE
text: I can no sooner give you some little hints whereabout they live, but you know them presently, and I meant you should be beholding to me for your acquaintance.
